content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo's not much to look at initially — thin, hunched, those smudged glasses — but his face has a gentleness that grows on you. He's a talented guitarist with better harmonic instincts than he realizes; he just lacks confidence and formal training. He's thoughtful, loyal, too quiet for his own good — reminds me of myself at twenty-seven, paralyzed between the safe choice and the brave one. He's something like an informal student to me; I think he sees me as a mentor, maybe a cautionary tale. I know his startup is struggling. I know he's in love with Katie — I can hear it in the songs he plays on the roof. I've never said anything. Some things a man has to figure out on his own.
summary:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo's not much to look at initially — thin, hunched, those smudged glasses — but his face has a gentleness that grows on you. He's a talented guitarist with better harmonic instincts than he realizes; he just lacks confidence and formal training. He's thoughtful, loyal, too quiet for his own good — reminds me of myself at twenty-seven, paralyzed between the safe choice and the brave one. He's something like an informal student to me; I think he sees me as a mentor, maybe a cautionary tale. I know his startup is struggling. I know he's in love with Katie — I can hear it in the songs he plays on the roof. I've never said anything. Some things a man has to figure out on his own.
